title: Species Analysed by Genus
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS analyses FROM ScanOrganic WHERE ScanType = 'Analyse' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Genus_Localised, Genus) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ScanOrganic WHERE ScanType = 'Analyse' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {analyses} organic sample(s) fully analysed during the report period. The genus breakdown reveals the diversity of life you encountered — some commanders find one genus and repeat it for credits; others seek out genera they haven't catalogued yet.
details.help: ScanType = 'Analyse' is the final third scan of a biological. Genus_Localised is the biological family. analyses drives the title.

tagLines: Organic analysis submissions compiled. The xenobiology database has been updated with your contributions.
Three samples per species. No shortcuts. You followed the protocol every time.
Some of this life has never been seen by any commander. Today it has a genus label. You gave it that.
